texto: Ordinarily, her love affairs are entered into skittishly, sometimes reluctantly. She doesn't dive into bed but flutters in like a wayward moth.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Maggie Shipstead: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Ordinarily, her love affairs are entered into skittishly, sometimes reluctantly. She doesn't dive…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, relationships, sex pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sex.

texto: People spent their lives searching for something beyond the simple friction of skin on skin, but there was nothing. The void between two people could never be closed, and in trying to close it, they would only learn everything that was to be despised in the other.
explicacao: Citação de Maggie Shipstead sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “People spent their lives searching for something beyond the simple friction of skin on skin, but …” articula sabedoria, nihilism, sex em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como sex.

frase_original: People spent their lives searching for something beyond the simple friction of skin on skin, but there was nothing. The void between two people could never be closed, and in trying to close it, they would only learn everything that was to be despised in the other.

texto: An airplane crossed the sky, and she imagined its interior-people packed in rows like eggs in a carton, the chemical smell of the toilets, pretzels in foil pouches, cans hiss-popping open, black oval of night sky embedded in the rattling walls. How strange that something so drab, so confined, so stifling with sour exhalations and the fumes of indifferent machinery might be mistaken for a star.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Maggie Shipstead: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “An airplane crossed the sky, and she imagined its interior-people packed in rows like eggs in a c…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, airplanes, flight pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
